scores.correctness_notes: The agent incorrectly uses `otlp` as the type value instead of `opentelemetry` (as specified in the gold standard). It also marks `services` as required when it is optional per the gold standard. The rest of the content (loki URL format, syslog tcp/udp, label interpolation) is accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: The type value `otlp` is incorrect — the correct Pebble type identifier is `opentelemetry`. The agent also claims services is required when it is optional. The `services: [-all]` exclusion syntax and 'omitted services = no forwarding' claim may not be accurate to Pebble's actual behavior.
